headline: Prologis Appoints Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to Board of Directors
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) today announced that its board of directors appointed Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. as a director of the company.

raw.headline: Prologis Appoints Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to Board of Directors
raw.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) today announced that its board of directors appointed Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. as a director of the company.

headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $170
summary: BTIG  analyst Thomas Catherwood   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $160 to $170.

raw.headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $170
raw.summary: BTIG  analyst Thomas Catherwood   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $160 to $170.
